payload.answer: The summary states the current architecture stance: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack should be a strict memory intake agent. It also leaves open whether Telegram should be added later and which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.
citations: "Brain DB should be the source of truth Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection Slack should be a strict memory intake agent Open questions - Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?"
